channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-16902] sanity test_51d: OST 3 has more objects vs. OST 2
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Serguei Smirnov <ssmirnov@ddn.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/b08fc94f-3029-4777-83ce-9322ed736a20

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/95615 - 4.18.0-425.10.1.el8_7.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/95615 - 4.18.0-425.10.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

Error: 'stripecount=3: OST 3 has more #0 objects vs. OST 2 (146 > 86 x 6/4)'

= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:6111:test_51d()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6919:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6968:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6805:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:6114:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-2/2023-06-15/lustre-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-1_95615_23_d9694280-7bec-4007-b5bd-7f692265c9d9//sanity.test_51d.*.1686796346.log
CMD: onyx-33vm4.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-33vm5,onyx-33vm6,onyx-33vm7,onyx-33vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-2/2023-06-15/lustre-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-1_95615_23_d9694280-7bec-4007-b5bd-7f692265c9d9//sanity.test_51d.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1686796346.log;
dmesg > /autotest/autotest-2/2023-06-15/lustre-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-1_95615_23_d9694280-7bec-4007-b5bd-7f692265c9d9//sanity.test_51d.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1686796346.log
CMD: onyx-33vm4.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-33vm5,onyx-33vm6,onyx-33vm7,onyx-33vm8 find /tmp/test-framework-keys -name '*.key' -exec lgss_sk -r {} \; &> /autotest/autotest-2/2023-06-15/lustre-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-1_95615_23_d9694280-7bec-4007-b5bd-7f692265c9d9//sanity.test_51d.ssk_keys.\$(hostname -s).1686796346.log
CMD: onyx-33vm7 lctl get_param 'nodemap..' > /autotest/autotest-2/2023-06-15/lustre-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-1_95615_23_d9694280-7bec-4007-b5bd-7f692265c9d9//sanity.test_51d.nodemaps.\$(hostname -s).1686796346.log
CMD: onyx-33vm4.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-33vm5,onyx-33vm6,onyx-33vm7,onyx-33vm8 keyctl show > /autotest/autotest-2/2023-06-15/lustre-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-1_95615_23_d9694280-7bec-4007-b5bd-7f692265c9d9//sanity.test_51d.keyring.\$(hostname -s).1686796346.log
CMD: onyx-33vm4.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-33vm5,onyx-33vm6,onyx-33vm7,onyx-33vm8 journalctl -a > /autotest/autotest-2/2023-06-15/lustre-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-1_95615_23_d9694280-7bec-4007-b5bd-7f692265c9d9//sanity.test_51d.journal.\$(hostname -s).1686796346.log
CMD: onyx-33vm7,onyx-33vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param osp.*.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0000-osc-MDT0000.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0000-osc-MDT0002.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0000.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0002.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0002-osc-MDT0000.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0002-osc-MDT0002.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0003-osc-MDT0000.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0003-osc-MDT0002.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0004-osc-MDT0000.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0004-osc-MDT0002.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0005-osc-MDT0000.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0005-osc-MDT0002.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0006-osc-MDT0000.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0006-osc-MDT0002.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0007-osc-MDT0000.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0007-osc-MDT0002.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0000-osc-MDT0001.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0000-osc-MDT0003.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0001.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0003.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0002-osc-MDT0001.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0002-osc-MDT0003.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0003-osc-MDT0001.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0003-osc-MDT0003.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0004-osc-MDT0001.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0004-osc-MDT0003.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0005-osc-MDT0001.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0005-osc-MDT0003.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0006-osc-MDT0001.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0006-osc-MDT0003.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0007-osc-MDT0001.create_count=64
osp.lustre-OST0007-osc-MDT0003.create_count=64
CMD: onyx-33vm7,onyx-33vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param lod.lustre-*.qos_threshold_rr=17
lod.lustre-MDT0001-mdtlov.qos_threshold_rr=17
lod.lustre-MDT0003-mdtlov.qos_threshold_rr=17
lod.lustre-MDT0000-mdtlov.qos_threshold_rr=17
lod.lustre-MDT0002-mdtlov.qos_threshold_rr=17
item.summary: sanity test_51d: OST 3 has more objects vs. OST 2

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Patch was based on tree without LU-16420
